overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing characters walking through a rain-soaked, neon-lit Night City street at night. The scene features wet reflective pavement, towering buildings with holographic advertisements, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel plaza with neon signage and palm trees

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position
crossing from hotel plaza onto the main street

agents.ego_description: female character with backpack and shorts walking through the neon-lit plaza toward the street

entered.detail: large pink neon sign spelling HOTEL on building facade
tropical trees in blue planters along the plaza edge
tall vertical advertisement screen showing product displays
rain-soaked reflective ground surface mirroring neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide plaza in front of a building with a prominent pink neon HOTEL sign. The character walks forward across wet, reflective pavement that mirrors the vibrant neon lights. Palm trees line the right side while holographic billboards glow in the distance, creating a classic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner convenience store under elevated highway

events.description: entering covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass
passing close to the corner store structure, temporarily blocking view of street

agents.ego_description: walking past a brightly lit corner convenience store with cyan interior lighting

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground against the corner store wall

entered.detail: small convenience store with bright cyan-lit interior windows and curved red roof
blue neon sign with Japanese characters ホテL
elevated concrete highway structure casting shadows overhead

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a semi-covered area beneath an elevated highway, approaching a corner store glowing with cyan light. A homeless person sits against the store wall. The environment shifts from open plaza to sheltered walkway, with a blue Japanese hotel sign visible on the left and the highway overpass dominating overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: beginning to follow two men in suits walking ahead on the sidewalk
futuristic vehicles passing by on the adjacent street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk following two men in dark suits, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two men in dark business suits walking ahead of the character
pedestrian in white jacket and bright blue pants walking opposite direction

entered.detail: series of large illuminated advertisements and brand displays on building walls
tall modern street lamps illuminating the walkway
sleek cyberpunk-style cars and trucks driving on the street

segments.scene_description: Walking under the elevated highway, the character follows two men in suits along a narrow sidewalk lined with bright neon billboards on the left. The area is sheltered from rain but illuminated by artificial lighting. Various pedestrians pass by, and futuristic vehicles can be seen driving on the street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection
beginning to cross the wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk
large blue six-wheeled limousine and red truck passing through intersection

agents.ego_description: character in red jacket crossing the wide intersection, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue six-wheeled limousine driving through the intersection
red pickup truck moving through the cross traffic

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
red vertical traffic signals suspended over the intersection
high-rise buildings covered with multiple neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a wide open intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. Waiting for traffic, a large blue limousine and red truck pass through before the character begins crossing. Tall office buildings covered in neon signage surround the intersection, creating a dense urban canyon effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, open plaza into the sheltered underbelly of a highway before emerging into a dense urban intersection. It begins in a wide plaza where the character walks across wet, reflective pavement beneath a prominent pink neon hotel sign and glowing holographic billboards. As the character moves forward, the open space shifts into a sheltered walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing a cyan-lit corner store and a blue Japanese hotel sign. The camera then follows two men in suits along a narrow sidewalk lined with bright neon advertisements, while futuristic vehicles stream past on the adjacent street. Finally, the scene opens up as the character emerges from under the overpass into a wide intersection, crossing yellow stripes between towering office buildings and passing limousines under a canopy of neon signage.
